title: 6 horizontal timeline variations from figma design
description: History (decade), versions (years), gantt-phases (months), sprint-days (days), time-blocks (hours), event-stream (minutes). Each with distinct horizontal layout.
variant: history, versions, gantt-phases, sprint-days, time-blocks, event-stream
resolution: 6 new horizontal render paths in builder + CSS + samples. History: above/below alternating. Versions: same but date-focused. Gantt: phase bars. Sprint-days: vertical bar columns. Time-blocks: proportional strip. Event-stream: dark horizontal dots.
